info.name: Employee Management System API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for all Employee Management API endpoints (80+ routes)

item.name: Authentication & Profile
item.description: User registration, login, logout, password resets, email verification, and OTP handling.

item.name: JWT Testing & Operations
item.description: Endpoints for token verification, generation, token refreshing, revocation, and viewing private data.

item.name: Employee Core CRUD
item.description: Standard REST operations on individual employee records.

item.name: Bulk Operations
item.description: Endpoints to insert, modify, or delete multiple employees in a single request.

item.name: Filters & Queries
item.description: Specific filters for extracting subsets of employee data.

item.name: Search
item.description: Unified keyword search across multiple fields.

item.name: Analytics (Aggregation)
item.description: MongoDB Aggregation Pipeline results for metrics, charts, and distribution breakdowns.

item.name: Statistics
item.description: Count statistical endpoints and array property metrics.

item.name: Admin Controls
item.description: Role-based routes restricted strictly to users with role='admin' in their JWT payload.

item.name: Protected Routes & Projects
item.description: Specific CRUD endpoints protected by authentication, including project arrays operations placeholders.
